title: 阪神大賞典の後に・ただちに浮上セヨ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is unable to pass Narita Brian
and ends up losing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After watching Narita Brian walk off with a cool
look on her face, she burns with the desire not to
let this rivalry end on a loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to beat Narita Brian, she decides her
next goal will be the same as hers—the spring
Tenno Sho.
